question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/health/SubscriberHealthIndicator.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: publishing()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the map(Scenario::getRate) call in publishing() by causing a scenario to throw an exception in getRate(), which would propagate through the reactive chain and potentially cause the health check to fail in an unexpected way, affecting transaction publishing and fee collection outside of design parameters?
